Simple by design

Three steps to your first £100

No complicated tiers, no fine print. Just share your link, and earn when the job is done.

01
Get your unique link
Log in or sign up to TradeMatch and copy your personal referral link from your dashboard. It's unique to you and tracks every referral automatically.
02
Share with anyone
Send your link to homeowners planning a renovation, or tradespeople looking for more work. Share via WhatsApp, email, social media, or any channel you choose.
03
Earn £100 per job
Once your referral completes their first job on TradeMatch, £100 is automatically transferred to you within 48 hours — no chasing, no forms, no minimum payout.

Everything you need to know

Frequently asked questions

Can't find the answer you need?

Our team is on hand 7 days a week to answer any questions about the referral programme.

Contact us
Programme health
£420,847
Total paid to referrers to date
Is there any limit on how many people I can refer?
No — there is absolutely no limit. You can refer 1 person or 1,000 people and earn £100 for every single verified job completion. There is also no cap on the total amount you can earn.
How long does it take to get paid?
Once a referred job is marked as complete and payment is released, your £100 is transferred within 48 hours. You can choose bank transfer or PayPal. There is no minimum payout threshold.
Do I need to already be a TradeMatch customer?
No. Anyone with a UK address can join the referral programme for free. Simply create a free account, get your link from the dashboard, and start sharing. You don't need to post a job or hire anyone yourself.
What counts as a "completed job"?
A job is considered complete when the homeowner confirms the work is done and releases payment through the TradeMatch platform. Both parties must have signed up using your referral link for it to count toward your reward.
What is the £250 milestone bonus?
When you reach 10 completed referrals (of any type), you receive a one-time bonus of £250 on top of your standard earnings. This is paid automatically within 48 hours of your 10th referral completing.
What is Gold status and how do I unlock it?
Gold status is unlocked when you complete 25 or more referrals. Gold members get a dedicated account manager, priority payment processing (same-day instead of 48-hour), and access to exclusive partnership opportunities.
Can I refer someone I live with?
Self-referrals and referrals from the same household are not eligible for the reward. Referrals must be genuinely new users with a different address. Our system automatically flags and removes self-referral attempts.
Is there a tax implication on my earnings?
Referral earnings may be subject to UK income tax if they exceed your annual tax-free allowance. We recommend speaking with a tax adviser if your earnings are substantial. TradeMatch issues earnings statements on request for your records.
Ready to start earning?

is one share away.
